_meta.note: W3 adversarial bridge test driving the real scorm_bridge_relay.js; no Moodle server needed.

validation_predicate: event.source===iframe.contentWindow AND type==="scorm" AND action in {ready,track} AND exelearningBridge===nonce AND typeof cmi==="object"

cases.name: attacker_valid_leaked_nonce
cases.note: forged co-resident frame, correct type+action+nonce+cmi; must fail event.source===iframe.contentWindow

cases.name: child_wrong_nonce
cases.note: real frame, valid identity, bad nonce; acceptTrack() returns false

cases.name: child_offlist_action
cases.note: real frame, correct nonce, action not in {ready,track}

cases.name: child_cmi_not_object
cases.note: real frame, correct nonce, malformed payload shape

cases.name: child_legit_after_handshake
cases.note: real frame, nonce learned via ready->config handshake; relay performs the track.php POST
